focal_document_element_description: The ability to remember information such as words, numbers, pictures, and procedures.
comments: Memorization is a basic cognitive ability not differentiating for data/AI professional competency. WIDAI appropriately does not include it. Not a gap.

strength_justification.methodology: No computational scoring — element determined out of WIDAI scope during semantic analysis
